HGSS.656.0001:
Hello, is this [0103,0000,0000]?\f
That reminds me... Telephones, they
change your voice into electricity to\r
carry it over a long distance,\r
don’t they?\f
So, if you consider that technology,
you could change Pokémon into\r
electricity and send them over large\r
distances as well, no?\f
So, based on that theory, I was able to
come up with and create the Pokémon\r
Storage system!\f
Well, it’s not quite as simple as a
telephone, but you get the idea, right?

HGSS.656.0003:
Who’s calling?\f
[0103,0000,0000], is it? Hang on a sec...\f
...
...\f
HGSS.656.0004:
Who’s calling?\f

...

HGSS.656.0005:
Well, you’re starting on the PC Box
named [010B,000A,0000] right now.\f
That’s an easy-to-remember name. 
Easy to remember is the best way to go.\f
OK, including the space left in
[010B,000A,0000], you can still hold\r
[0134,000B,0000] more Pokémon in the PC.\f
HGSS.656.0006:
Right now you’re using the PC Box
named [010B,000A,0000], right?\f
That is a great name--I really like it.\f
OK, including the space left in
[010B,000A,0000], you can still hold\r
[0134,000B,0000] more Pokémon in the PC.\f
HGSS.656.0007:
So your PC Box is called
[010B,000A,0000], right?\f
That’s not an ordinary name. I have a
feeling you know a good name when\r
you see it...\f
OK, including the space left in
[010B,000A,0000], you can still hold\r
[0134,000B,0000] more Pokémon in the PC.\f
HGSS.656.0009:
Your PC Boxes are full!\f
You’ll have to release some Pokémon
if you want to catch more.\f
HGSS.656.0010:
Hey, this is Bill here.\f
You know your PC Boxes are full, right?\f
You’ve done a great job of catching
Pokémon, haven’t you!\f
Seriously, it’s wonderful, I tip my hat!\f
That said, you do understand that with
your PC Boxes full like that, you can’t\r
catch any more Pokémon?\r
Just so you know.
